name: Fireball

components.material: a ball of bat guano and sulfur

description: A bright streak flashes to a point within range and blossoms into a fiery explosion. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered there makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much on a success.
scaling: The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 3.
